location: Guaranteed drop from a unique Black Knight standing at the top of a hillside encampment on the western side of Scadu Altus, overlooking the road toward Shadow Keep (northeast of the Church of the Crusade).

source.name: Black Knight (western hill camp, Scadu Altus)

tactics: From Highroad Cross grace, head north along the main road past a wandering Furnace Golem, then cut west and climb the hillside camp to find the Black Knight at the top.
The Black Knight is guarded by several regular soldiers in the camp, so consider thinning those out or luring the knight away before committing to the 1v1.
This particular Black Knight appears to be a unique, single spawn tied to the drop rather than a respawning enemy type, so you only need to beat it once to get the weapon.
The drop is guaranteed on defeat, so there's no need to farm it or worry about drop rate.
lore: Standard-issue arm of the Black Knights who serve Messmer the Impaler: twin blades of black steel trimmed in gold, carrying a built-in holy blessing from the Erdtree that grows even stronger if further sanctified by the wielder.

builds.name: Faith-Quality hybrid
builds.why: Even D-grade scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Faith, plus a flat innate Holy damage bonus, rewards spreading points across all three rather than dumping into one stat.

builds.name: Sacred-infused Holy burst
builds.why: Infusing with the Sacred affinity swaps physical scaling for pure Faith scaling and stacks with the weapon's innate Holy damage line, turning it into a high Holy-AR melee option for a Faith-heavy incantation build.
